channel.title: Maine Judicial Branch Court Alerts & Closings
channel.description: Definition-list (dt/dd) of court closures and alerts with no per-item links; monitored by full-page fingerprint.

item.title: Page updated: Maine Judicial Branch Court Alerts & Closings
item.description: This page's content changed since the last check. No structured items could be extracted automatically; visit the page directly to review the update.
